reasoning: The control AU-16(2) focuses on cross-organizational audit logging and sharing of audit information. In Kubernetes, this can be mapped to ensuring that audit logs are enabled and configured to be shared or integrated with external logging systems that facilitate cross-organizational access and analysis. This involves configuring Kubernetes audit logs to be sent to external systems or services that support cross-organizational sharing, such as centralized logging platforms.
title: Cross-Organizational Audit Logging - Cross - organizational audit logging | sharing of audit information provide cros
